name: arkyn
description: A comprehensive TypeScript ecosystem for building modern web applications with React and Remix, featuring UI components, server utilities, shared tools, and data templates.
author: Arkyn | Lucas Gonçalves

scripts.all:audit: bun run components:audit && bun run server:audit && bun run shared:audit && bun run templates:audit
scripts.all:build: bun run components:build && bun run server:build && bun run shared:build && bun run templates:build
scripts.all:test: bun run server:test && bun run shared:test
scripts.all:typecheck: bun run components:typecheck && bun run server:typecheck && bun run shared:typecheck && bun run templates:typecheck
